info.name: VS — UC1: Bus Operator Driving Licence Verification
info.description:
## Verification Service Network — UC1: Bus Operator Driving Licence Verification

**Scenario:** CityExpress Bus Services (Requesting NP) verifies the heavy motor
vehicle driving licence of driver applicant Ravi Kumar via TrustVerify India
(Provider NP) during employment onboarding. Real-time lookup against Parivahan
Sewa; result available within 30 minutes. On confirmation the contract is active
and verification is in progress (PENDING). On status poll, the result is returned
as VERIFIED with a signed PDF certificate.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + Verification Service schema pack v2.1.0
**Verification type:** DRIVING_LICENCE | **Method:** REAL_TIME_API | **Turnaround:** PT30M
**Purpose:** EMPLOYMENT_ONBOARDING | **Consent:** OTP

### Structural conventions

- `select` carries a DRAFT `Contract` (per `SelectAction.contract` in core spec)
- BAP originates the contract without an id; Provider NP assigns id at `on_select`
- `contractAttributes` absent at select / on_select — subject not yet identified
- BAP introduces subject, purpose, and consent reference at `init`
- `on_confirm` returns aggregateResult PENDING — verification is async (PT30M SLA)
- `on_status` returns aggregateResult VERIFIED + performance record + issuedCredentials

### Consideration lifecycle

| Call | status.code | price | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| catalog (on_discover) | *(none)* | ₹250 | no status on catalog |
| on_select | PENDING | ₹250 | priced; Requesting NP has not yet committed |
| init | PENDING | ₹250 | Requesting NP echoes binding intent |
| on_init | QUOTED | ₹250 | binding quote; payment instructions out-of-band |
| confirm / on_confirm / on_status | ACTIVE | ₹250 | payment authorisation submitted |

### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **VS_Environment.json** (Environments → Import) and select it.
2. Set `base_url`, `requesting_np_uri`, `provider_np_uri`, and `auth_token`.
3. Run folders 01–10 in order.

variable.description: Provider NP (BPP) endpoint — set per environment
Requesting NP (BAP) callback URI — set per environment
Provider NP (BPP) URI — set per environment
Requesting NP network identifier (maps to bapId in Beckn context)
Provider NP network identifier (maps to bppId in Beckn context)
Confirm exact domain prefix with network team
Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID — regenerate for separate test runs
Assigned by Provider NP at on_select
Masked mobile for display — not shared in full

item.name: 01 — discover
item.description: Requesting NP (CityExpress) broadcasts intent to discover driving licence verification services.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**discover** — Requesting NP → Gateway

CityExpress Bus Services broadcasts discovery intent filtering for DRIVING_LICENCE verification resources. schemaContext included (catalog phase).

item.name: 02 — on_discover
item.description: Provider NP (TrustVerify India) returns its full catalog with DL verification resource and offer.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_discover** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

TrustVerify India returns its full catalog. Requesting NP selects `offer-vs-dl-std-001` (₹250/request, PT30M turnaround).

item.name: 03 — select
item.description: Requesting NP originates the DRAFT contract selecting the DL verification offer.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**select** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Requesting NP originates a DRAFT Contract selecting `offer-vs-dl-std-001` for 1 verification. No contract id yet — Provider NP assigns it at on_select. Minimal participant (no PII at this stage). No contractAttributes — subject will be introduced at init.

item.name: 04 — on_select
item.description: Provider NP assigns contract id and returns PENDING pricing.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_select** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Provider NP assigns `{{contract_id}}` and returns PENDING consideration (₹250). Requesting NP now has the contract id to use in all subsequent calls. No contractAttributes — subject not yet in scope.

item.name: 05 — init
item.description: Requesting NP submits full participant details, subject reference, purpose, and consent.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**init** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Requesting NP introduces: (1) full organisation descriptor, (2) contractAttributes with subject (Ravi Kumar), purpose (EMPLOYMENT_ONBOARDING), and consent reference (OTP, granted 10:28 IST). Consideration echoed as PENDING — binding intent signalled.

item.name: 06 — on_init
item.description: Provider NP returns binding QUOTED consideration.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_init** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Provider NP returns QUOTED consideration (₹250 via UPI, UPFRONT). Payment instructions are issued out-of-band. Requesting NP proceeds to payment and then confirm.

item.name: 07 — confirm
item.description: Requesting NP confirms the contract with payment authorisation.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**confirm** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Requesting NP confirms the contract with ACTIVE consideration and UPI payment authorisation. Contract status moves to ACTIVE. Provider NP will begin the DL verification immediately.

item.name: 08 — on_confirm  ★ Verification Started
item.description: Provider NP acknowledges payment and indicates verification is in progress (aggregateResult PENDING).

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_confirm** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

Contract is ACTIVE. Payment received. aggregateResult is INCONCLUSIVE (verification submitted to Parivahan Sewa; PT30M SLA). Requesting NP should poll via `status` after the SLA window.

item.name: 09 — status
item.description: Requesting NP polls for verification result after PT30M.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**status** — Requesting NP → Provider NP

Poll for the verification result. Per core spec StatusAction, message.contract carries the contract id and commitment refs (not a flat message.contractId).

item.name: 10 — on_status  ★ Verification Complete
item.description: Provider NP returns VERIFIED result with performance record and signed PDF certificate.

header.description: Network-issued JWT — set before running the collection.

request.description:
**on_status** — Provider NP → Requesting NP

aggregateResult VERIFIED. Licence KA0120190123456 confirmed against Parivahan Sewa (matchScore 0.98, HMV endorsement active). issuedCredentials contains a signed PDF certificate valid for 90 days. CityExpress can download the certificate from the URL and store it in Ravi Kumar's onboarding record.
